verif_result.classifier_reason: The contract capability limit declares max_supported_bus_bits=4096, but input_width_bits=10240 (1280 features × 8b) directly violates that cap. Vivado synthesis completed but produced zero LUT/FF/DSP (all resource counts are 0, success=false), consistent with the tool optimizing away a design whose wide combinational accumulator cannot be mapped under the bus constraint. Multiple pipeline-register removal warnings (acc_tmp_reg, biased_tmp_reg, scaled_tmp_reg, v_tmp_reg, clamped_tmp_reg) confirm the datapath was synthesized to nothing rather than a correctable RTL bug. This is the 3rd Surgeon attempt with sim_passed but synthesis still zeroed out, ruling out a simple code fix. A serialized/tiled gemm contract or wider bus limit is required.

verif_result_json.classifier_reason: The contract capability limit declares max_supported_bus_bits=4096, but input_width_bits=10240 (1280 features × 8b) directly violates that cap. Vivado synthesis completed but produced zero LUT/FF/DSP (all resource counts are 0, success=false), consistent with the tool optimizing away a design whose wide combinational accumulator cannot be mapped under the bus constraint. Multiple pipeline-register removal warnings (acc_tmp_reg, biased_tmp_reg, scaled_tmp_reg, v_tmp_reg, clamped_tmp_reg) confirm the datapath was synthesized to nothing rather than a correctable RTL bug. This is the 3rd Surgeon attempt with sim_passed but synthesis still zeroed out, ruling out a simple code fix. A serialized/tiled gemm contract or wider bus limit is required.
